CustomField.description: True when the AI Triage Agent has identified this comment as a potential "issue exhaustion" comment under the Vermont Yankee doctrine. These are technically specific, legally precise objections that may be setting up a future APA lawsuit. Flagged comments must be routed to agency legal counsel for a substantive written response in the Final EIS — failure to respond may result in vacatur. Set by NEPA_Comment_Triage Agent; human-reviewable via nepa_legal_review_status__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI flagged this comment as a potential Vermont Yankee issue exhaustion comment. Route to legal counsel for required written response.
CustomField.label: Litigation Threat Flag
